title: Chevalita
content:
"Chevalita,
        Pretty cretr,
        I do love her
        Like a brother;
        Just to ride
        Is my delight,
        For she does not
        Kick or bite,"
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Chevalita"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
